query:
SELECT 
  mi.materialCode,
  mi.materialName,
  mi.supplierName,
  mi.dailySchedule
FROM material_items mi
WHERE mi.planId = (SELECT id FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1)
  AND mi.materialCode = 'A1502484'
LIMIT 5;
